rhp_definition: Runtime Handoff Package — the only class of artifacts admitted as PSEE runtime inputs. All elements must trace to IG-governed source paths with explicit ingestion decisions.

excluded_input_classes.reason: Validation artifacts are governance-layer artifacts, not runtime evidence
UI/demo artifacts are L6/L7 rendering outputs, not ingestion inputs
Replay artifacts are debug-mode isolates, not governed runtime inputs
Behavioral case analysis is projection output, not ingestion-layer evidence

fail_safe: Any PSEE runtime consumption of non-RHP input → FAIL_SAFE_STOP
